name: Zesty Vegetable Tray
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the vegetables in alternate rows on a tray.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Sprinkle with garlic and parsley.
4. Combine vinegar and oil in a jar. Tighten the lid securely and shake well.
5. Pour over the vegetables.
6. Garnish with parsley.
